properties.name: Munich whole-city boundary
properties.attribution: Landeshauptstadt München - GeodatenService, www.muenchen.de/rathaus/Stadtverwaltung/Kommunalreferat/geodatenservice; Datenlizenz Deutschland – Namensnennung – Version 2.0 (dl-de/by-2.0); https://opendata.muenchen.de/dataset/vablock_stadtbezirke_opendata. Modified: deduplicated districts 18/19, dissolved 25 Stadtbezirke, reprojected EPSG:25832 → EPSG:4326.
properties.transformation_notes: Deduplicated using field 'sb_nummer' (prefer higher vertex count); confirmed 25 unique districts 01–25; dissolved with shapely.ops.unary_union; reprojected EPSG:25832 → EPSG:4326 via pyproj/geopandas. Dissolve area diff vs combined districts (EPSG:25832): -0.000001 m².
